_comment: Example scanner configuration. Copy to scanner_config.json and customize.
_comment2: Only include the settings you want to change - defaults are loaded automatically.

serial._comment: Use /dev/serial/by-id/... for more stable device identification

camera._comment: preview_color_swap: true for BGR->RGB conversion (Pi Camera)

capture._comment: perspectives: number of rotational positions (72 = 5° steps for full 360°)

xmp._comment: These values customize XMP sidecar generation for RealityScan/RealityCapture

ui._comment: jog_step_delay: seconds between motor steps during continuous jog
